title: Changelog Entry
description: Shape of a deep-review skill changelog entry (e.g. changelog/v1.9.0.0.md). The markdown file embeds these fields in frontmatter + a structured body. This schema captures the frontmatter fields and required body sections.

date.description: ISO 8601 date of the changelog entry

summary.description: One-paragraph summary of what changed and why it matters

breaking.description: True if any change in this entry breaks backward compatibility

fixed.description: Bug fixes (with reference to audit-finding IDs where relevant)

audit_finding_refs.description: Optional list of audit-finding IDs resolved or deferred in this version

examples.summary: Release-cleanup pass against current sk-doc templates and HVR standards. README rewritten to marketing-leaning voice anchored at ~70% of Public/README.md intensity per ADR-005. Surgical alignment fixes across references, assets, feature catalog, and manual testing playbook. Smart Router preserved (untouched). Reducer (reduce-state.cjs, 1657 LOC) bug-scan only, no behavioral edits.

added: Release-cleanup spec folder at .opencode/specs/.../131/000/003-deep-review with 4 JSON schemas and resource-map
changed: README.md full rewrite per skill_readme_template.md with HVR score >= 85 and tone calibration per ADR-005
fixed: [N] structural deviations across references/ per audit-findings AF-0001..AF-XXXX
deferred: [K] P2 items deferred with rationale recorded in audit-findings.jsonl
